  task_pef everydac;
  USEVARIABLES = 
    verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd educatin cog_rese;
  IDVARIABLE = id;
  knownclass = cg (group = 1 group = 2);
  CLASSES = cg (2) c (3);

ANALYSIS:
  TYPE = MIXTURE;
  ESTIMATOR = MLR;
  STARTS = 0;
  ALGO = INTEGRATION;
  INTEGRATION = MONTECARLO;

MODEL:
 %OVERALL%
  C on CG;
 
   %OVERALL%
  c#1-c#2 ON educatin@0 cog_rese@0;
  educatin cog_rese;

  ! Profile means and variances
      %cg#1.c#1%
      [verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd] (m1_1-m1_5);
      verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd (v1-v5);
  
      %cg#1.c#2%
      [verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd] (m2_1-m2_5);
      verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd (v1-v5);
  
      %cg#1.c#3%
      [verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd] (m3_1-m3_5);
      verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd (v1-v5);
  
      %cg#2.c#1%
      [verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd] (m1_1-m1_5);
      verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd (v1-v5);
  
      %cg#2.c#2%
      [verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd] (m2_1-m2_5);
      verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd (v1-v5);
  
      %cg#2.c#3%
      [verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd] (m3_1-m3_5);
      verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd (v1-v5);

! ================================================
! PREDICTIVE - EQUAL - FREE VARIANCES
! ================================================

TITLE: Predictive - EQUAL - FREE VARIANCES

DATA: FILE IS mglpa_wm_dataset_n1000.dat;

VARIABLE:
  NAMES = 
    id group verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd educatin cog_rese
  task_pef everydac;
  USEVARIABLES = 
    verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd educatin cog_rese;
  IDVARIABLE = id;
  knownclass = cg (group = 1 group = 2);
  CLASSES = cg (2) c (3);

ANALYSIS:
  TYPE = MIXTURE;
  ESTIMATOR = MLR;
  STARTS = 0;
  ALGO = INTEGRATION;
  INTEGRATION = MONTECARLO;

MODEL:
 %OVERALL%
  C on CG;
 
   %OVERALL%
  c#1-c#2 ON educatin cog_rese;
  educatin cog_rese;

  ! Profile means and variances
      %cg#1.c#1%
      [verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd] (m1_1-m1_5);
      verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd (v1-v5);
  
      %cg#1.c#2%
      [verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd] (m2_1-m2_5);
      verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd (v1-v5);
  
      %cg#1.c#3%
      [verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd] (m3_1-m3_5);
      verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd (v1-v5);
  
      %cg#2.c#1%
      [verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd] (m1_1-m1_5);
      verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd (v1-v5);
  
      %cg#2.c#2%
      [verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd] (m2_1-m2_5);
      verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd (v1-v5);
  
      %cg#2.c#3%
      [verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd] (m3_1-m3_5);
      verbal_m visual_m updating inhibitn proc_spd (v1-v5);
    OUTPUT:
    STDYX SAMPSTAT CINTERVAL SVALUES TECH1 TECH7 ;
